title: A Fool's Spread
description: A traveling fortune teller has parked her wagon on the eastern road out of Harmonia. It was not there before the cave. She offers a reading; one of the cards she turns over doesn't belong to her deck.

offer.speaker: Madame Orrery
offer.text: You have a road behind you and a road ahead of you. I can read both for a small fee. Sit down. Don't touch the cards.

offer.speaker: Madame Orrery
offer.text: Five cards. One for your past, three for your present, one for your... what's that word. Outcome.

accept.speaker: Madame Orrery
accept.text: Good. Hands on the table. Palms down. Try not to think about anything in particular, which of course means you will now think about nothing else.

accept.speaker: Madame Orrery
accept.text: Four cards of journeys and transformation. Standard. The fifth card is blank. That has never happened before.

accept.speaker: Madame Orrery
accept.text: Tell me — have you seen a man who knows too much and says it wrong? Ask him if he is missing a piece of paper.

decline.speaker: Madame Orrery
decline.text: No? Fair. The cards will keep. They have more patience than I do. Find me when curiosity wins.

in_progress.speaker: Madame Orrery
in_progress.text: The blank card is still on my table. It has not decided yet what to be. The man who talks wrong — he has something of mine. Or something of somebody's.

ready_to_turn_in.speaker: Madame Orrery
ready_to_turn_in.text: You have it. Put it on the table. Do not unfold it.

complete.speaker: Madame Orrery
complete.text: This is notation. It is not mine. It is not from any system I know. Which means one of two things: either the system is new, or I am older than I thought.

complete.speaker: Madame Orrery
complete.text: Take this card. It is a real card. It is heavy for its size. It will matter, later. I will not tell you how. I do not know how either. I only know that it will.

complete.speaker: Madame Orrery
complete.text: Come find me when you have seen more of the world. I would like to compare notes. I travel in directions the maps do not include.

objectives.description: Find the man who knows too much and says it wrong.
Return the folded paper to Madame Orrery.

unlocks_dialogue.note: W2 chain step recognizes the party ('your energy profile')

cross_world_connection: The symbol on Phil's paper matches the notation on the Calibrant's blueprints in W3. The Fool Card accrues one mark per completed Orrery chain step; five marks + W6 completes the chain (fool_card -> wild_card transform, already authored in world6_orrery.json).
_wiring_notes: Phil the Lost already exists in Harmonia (near the well). Step 2 grants nothing to inventory — the folded paper is narrative-carried. Orrery's wagon spawns on the east road only after cutscene_flag_rat_king_defeated. Orrery ruling 2026-07-08: item grants (fool_card, charm/unwritten_chord Bard branch) live in world1_orrery via cutscene_on_complete; quest keeps gold/exp only.
